query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Audit', 'An official verification of records, especially financial', 'The essay highlights the audit of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Audition', 'A trial to test a performer''s suitability for something', 'Critics argued that the plan might audition the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Auditor', 'A person appointed to examine accounting records', 'The author hoped the new policy would auditor tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Auditory', 'Of, or relating to hearing', 'The author hoped the new policy would auditory tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Augment', 'To increase or add to', '“The company plans to augment its workforce by hiring more employees.”', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Augur', 'To foretell events, to exhibit signs of future events', 'Over time, the community learned to augur its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Augury', 'A divination based on the behaviour of animals', 'The essay highlights the augury of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('August', 'Inspiring reverence or admiration, majestic', 'Her august became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Augustinian', 'Pertaining to st. augustine of hippo', 'Scholars noted a striking augustinian between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aura', 'Distinctive atmosphere or quality associated with something', 'Her aura became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aural', 'Of or pertaining to the ear', 'Critics argued that the plan might aural the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aureole', 'Any encircling ring of light, halo', 'The essay highlights the aureole of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Auricle', 'The outer ear or pinna', 'Scholars noted a striking auricle between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Auriferous', 'Containing or producing gold, gold-bearing', 'The reviewer described the tone as auriferous, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aurora', 'An atmospheric phenomenon creating bands of light in the sky', 'Her aurora became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Auroral', 'Pertaining to the dawn', 'The author hoped the new policy would auroral tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Auspice', 'Patronage or protection', 'The essay highlights the auspice of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Auspicious', 'Indicating a favorable outcome or success', '“The clear skies were an auspicious sign for the outdoor wedding.”', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Austere', 'Severe or strict in manner; lacking luxury', '“The monastery had an austere lifestyle with minimal comforts.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Autarchy', 'A condition of absolute power', 'Scholars noted a striking autarchy between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Authentic', 'Of the same origin as claimed, genuine', 'Scholars noted a striking authentic between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Authenticate', 'Prove something is genuine', 'The author hoped the new policy would authenticate tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Authoritarian', 'Of, or relating to, absolute obedience to an authority', 'The author hoped the new policy would authoritarian tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Autobiography', 'A self-written biography, the story of one''s own life', 'Scholars noted a striking autobiography between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Autocracy', 'A form of government in which one individual holds all power', 'Her autocracy became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Autocrat', 'An absolute ruler with infinite power', 'Scholars noted a striking autocrat between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Automaton', 'A robot designed to follow a sequence of instructions', 'The author hoped the new policy would automaton tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Autonomous', 'Having self-government or independence', 'The passage presents a autonomous portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Autopsy', 'A post-mortem examination to discover the cause of death', 'The author hoped the new policy would autopsy tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Autumnal', 'Of or relating to autumn', 'Over time, the community learned to autumnal its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Auxiliary', 'Helping, giving assistance or support', 'The essay highlights the auxiliary of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avalanche', 'A large mass of snow sliding suddenly downward', 'Her avalanche became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avant-garde', 'Innovative, pioneering, especially when obviously so', 'The essay highlights the avant-garde of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avarice', 'Extreme greed for wealth', 'The essay highlights the avarice of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avaricious', 'Having extreme greed for wealth', 'What seemed avaricious at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avatar', 'An incarnation or manifestation of a person or idea', 'Scholars noted a striking avatar between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avenge', 'To vindicate by inflicting pain or evil on a wrongdoer', 'The author hoped the new policy would avenge tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aver', 'To state or assert to be the case', 'Over time, the community learned to aver its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Averse', 'To turn away', 'The author hoped the new policy would averse tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aversion', 'A strong dislike', 'Her aversion became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avert', 'To turn aside or away', 'Critics argued that the plan might avert the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aviary', 'An enclosure for keeping birds confined', 'Scholars noted a striking aviary between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avid', 'Having or showing keen interest', 'What seemed avid at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avidity', 'Greediness, strong appetite', 'Scholars noted a striking avidity between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avocation', 'A calling away, a diversion', 'Scholars noted a striking avocation between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avow', 'Assert or confess openly', 'The essay highlights the avow of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Avuncular', 'In the manner of an uncle, pertaining to an uncle', 'Critics argued that the plan might avuncular the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Awaken', 'To cause to become awake', 'Critics argued that the plan might awaken the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Awe', 'To inspire fear and reverence', 'Over time, the community learned to awe its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Awry', 'Crooked, distorted, out of place', 'The essay highlights the awry of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
